title: Kāramadai Heat Wave
lead: Kāramadai is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.31. The heat wave has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current temperature is significantly higher than usual, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 10.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 69%, and wind speed is moderate at 16.2 km/h. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under strain due to the intense heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
